notes: Phase 1 — first-run confirm gate. New device with no confirmed profile now hits a one-screen setup over the app on launch: enter operator name (required), confirm the baked AUS-01 site summary, optionally fill rack-naming + PDU (blank is safe — getContextBlock skips blanks). On CONFIRM, stamps confirmedAt so it never re-fires. SITE_PROFILE_DEFAULTS gains operator + confirmedAt; siteProfile_load() backfills confirmedAt from lastUpdated so existing saved profiles are never re-prompted; new siteProfile_isConfirmed(). New collision-free fr-* overlay (z-index 9500) + firstRun_show/confirm/renderChip/openProfile. NOW page shows an 'AUS-01 · {operator}' chip (one-tap to the profile editor, replacing the buried Master-overflow path; flags 'floor details pending' if rack/PDU blank). No change to getContextBlock or the 7 AI injection sites. Three stamps at v1.6.70.
